content: Mulberry32 is the established seeded PRNG for JavaScript deterministic procedural generation: tiny (4 lines), fast, 32-bit, closure-based. Seed determines the entire sequence. For determinism across synthesis calls: create the RNG once per DayVector using hash(subId, day, genomeVersion) as seed; consume random values in a fixed, documented call order within genShell(); never use Math.random() anywhere in engine/. The mock already implements this pattern correctly with mulberry32(seed) returning a closure.
